rn_evalfn3_convection_AdaptMut_algoconve: Steady increase, greater spikes in first generations
no_det_nodet_AdaptMutF0: Strangely stable with frequent small jitter, but lower fitness overall
AdaptMutF0pmut08: Long periods of stagnation, with little drops but no improvements
AdaptMutF0: Intermittent drops in fitness are soft restarts, stagnation is hard to notice (if it exists at all)
AdaptMutF0initialgenotype0_f0_basic2: Slightly more prone to break good solutions
no_det_nodet_convection_eaSimpleF1pop100: A couple of moderate jumps, but long periods with no improvement
AdaptMutF1: BIG STAGNATION in the second half, and in general
AdaptMutF0initialgenotype0_f0_neurons: Almost instant fitness increase, no prolonged warmup time, but more stagnant overall ( #idea maybe use the genotype to init population, but for replacement mutation still use the X genotype)
AdaptMutF0pmut08pop100: More stable, but slow, small improvement
NEAT_speciationF0pop100: Big potential for spikes, but can also get stuck in stagnation
eaSimpleF0: Very slow/stagnation in second half, but good enough growth in the first half
AdaptMutF1initialgenotypeXXGGpartTSN: Less 'almost instant' fitness improvement, still stagnation
AdaptMutF1initialgenotypeXX: A bit more unpredictable than the basic version, but still big stagnation
eaSimpleF0initialgenotype0_f0_neurons: Faster initial growth, but less diversity I think (it tends to stagnate and has stable results (aka most runs arrive in the same fitness ballbark))
NEAT_speciationF0pop100nislands5: Noticeably lower fitness overall, more stable and slow-ish increase
NEAT_speciationF0: Good initial growth, decent jitter, steady increase
NEAT_speciationF1dissimPHENESTRUCTGREEDY: More moderate spikes over entire run, better progress in some runs, but still plateaus in first quarter pretty frequently
NEAT_speciationF1nislands5: Gets 1 big spike then plateaus/stagnates mostly
NEAT_speciationF0pop200nislands15: More stagnant ( #advice maybe less generations per run, not enough time for species to mature)
NEAT_speciationF0dissimPHENESTRUCTGREEDY: A bit more stable than the default
NEAT_speciationF1: Way lower increases per spike than f0
eaMuPlusLambdaF0pmut08lbda350: Disappointingly slow and steady, Comma looked better wrt. jitter
NEAT_speciationF0nislands5: Steady spikes overall, but prone to long periods of stagnation
eaSimpleF0initialgenotype0_f0_basic2: Jumps in first third and one more moderate jump at 2/3
rn_evalfn3_convection_AdaptMut_algoconve: Pretty slow start, ~2 spikes in second half
eaSimpleF1pmut08: Not much difference with default pmut
eaMuPlusLambdaF0pmut08lbda100: Larger and generally more early spikes compared to Comma, but still stagnation
eaMuCommaLambdaF0pmut08lbda100: Kinda hillclimber, but it can go down
eaMuCommaLambdaF1pmut08lbda100: Very bad ( #idea the F1 mutation/xover operators are weaker than F0)
eaMuCommaLambdaF0pmut08lbda350: Very slow warmup (eval budget go brrr)
eaSimpleF1initialgenotypeXXGGpartTSN: Even BIGGER stagnation, not faster initial growth
eaMuCommaLambdaF1pmut08lbda350: Struggling very much, but much better than lbda100
eaMuPlusLambdaF1pmut08lbda350: Even lower fitness, for some reason it struggles to get over 50 fitness
NEAT_speciationF1dissimPHENEDESCRIPTORS: Struggles to clear 20 fitness, gets ~200 evals before stopping
NEAT_speciationF1dissimPHENEDENSITYFREQ: Gets close to 100 fitness, gets ~5000 evals before stopping
NEAT_speciationF1dissimPHENEDENSITYCOUNT: Struggles to clear 50 fitness, gets ~1000 evals before stopping
